data.name: JASON, Coming of Age
data.detailed_description:
一款成人視覺小說，帶你深入體驗一名 25 歲年輕男性在探索愛情、人生與神秘力量時所經歷的熱血與悸動。

你剛獲得一份地方報社的技術員工作，隨後搬到城市，卻逐漸發現自己對周圍女性擁有一種無法解釋的吸引力。這份神祕魅力的來源究竟是什麼？而你又將如何處理周遭人際關係的糾葛，以及它們對你未來所帶來的影響？

JASON : Coming of Age 的設計理念，是在遵循視覺小說本質的前提下，為玩家提供最大的自由度。

你的每個選擇都會影響故事走向。無論是對話還是整段劇情，都會根據你的決定進行調整。你的行動可能帶來深遠後果，並改變角色之間的互動方式。

雖然第一章有主要劇情主線，但可以用多種方式體驗——選擇權完全在你手中……

某些角色的個性，甚至個別主角的性別，都可能因你的選擇而改變，深刻影響故事的發展，以及你與他們之間的關係。

主要特色：

  • 自由探索的可能性：無論你在開局時設定的偏好為何（如性向、想避免的內容、或你不敢言說的幻想），遊戲都允許你在過程中的任何時刻探索非典型關係，只要你願意。

  • 偏好設定全面生效：遊戲會根據你的各類偏好進行自動調整，無論是性向、吸引類型或特定興趣，皆能提供更沉浸、更量身打造的體驗。

  • Love Interests 親密度自訂：你可以自訂與主要角色的親密屬性，使情感與沉浸感更上一層樓。這些設定可隨時在專屬選單中修改，並立即在全遊戲中生效。

  • 角色圖鑑（Compendium）：查看故事主要角色清單、可自訂的個人化頭像，從已解鎖的造型中選擇你喜歡的風格，並直接進入親密度自訂選單。每位角色都附有詳細介紹與動態日誌，記錄你們共同經歷的事件，讓你更清楚掌握自己的遊戲進程。

  • 動態畫廊：隨著你的選擇推動劇情，重要場景與片段將陸續解鎖。你可以在遊玩途中或主選單中查看，重溫故事中的精彩時刻。

  • 互動式探索：發現隱藏區域以解鎖全新場景，並利用遊戲中的按鍵切換多重視角，獲得更多元、更沉浸的體驗。

  • 沉浸式訊息互動：透過內建手機介面查看角色發來的訊息，沉浸式回覆並影響你與他們的關係。這項功能為遊戲增添逼真感與互動層次。

  • 時間管理：每個場景都具有清楚標註的時間點，讓你能完整追蹤事件的時間軸。手機介面也會隨遊戲內時間流動自動更新。

  • 統計資料：隨時查看與各 Love Interests 的詳細互動統計，更清楚理解你的選擇帶來的影響。

  • 多重路線與智慧選擇：如果你願意，在決定最終走向前，可以先試玩所有可用路線，然後再選擇你最喜歡的那一條。不再需要瘋狂存檔！不再害怕錯過內容！遊戲會讓你先嘗試其他分支，最後由你親自確認將延續哪個路線進入後續冒險。

  • 重播模式：可從額外內容選單中任意重玩任何場景，重新體驗故事中的關鍵瞬間。

關於遊戲格式與結構的說明：

JASON : Coming of Age 被設計成像影集一樣的多章節視覺小說。此處提供的第一章（Partie 1）是一個完整且最終定稿的內容，擁有獨立而一致的敘事結構；後續內容——包含目前開發中的第二章（Partie 2）——將以DLC形式推出。這種模式讓我們能在維持規律更新的同時，根據玩家社群的回饋持續擴展遊戲世界。

本作屬於後宮（harem）類型，具有自由探索（free roam）階段、大量Love Interests、並著重於角色互動與關係構築。雖然第一章有一條主要敘事線，但它更像是開放且可自由演進的冒險的主軸。遊戲的目的不是解開某個謎題，也不是達成單一結局，而是沉浸在故事中，讓你的選擇、邂逅與人際連結塑造你的旅程。角色關係的演變與情感動態才是本作的核心。

data.short_description: 扮演一名 25 歲的年輕男子，在探索愛情、誘惑，以及自身那股神祕吸引力的過程中逐步覺醒。 沉浸於一個情色、強烈且難以預測的世界之中，你每一個選擇都將深刻影響你的命運。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 土耳其文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 日文, 波蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Dual-Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics card with OpenGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • VR 支援: NA

  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz Dual-Core or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with OpenGL 3.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible
  • VR 支援: NA

  • 處理器: Intel Core M or Apple M1 (support via Rosetta if necessary)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics card with OpenGL 2.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX / macOS compatible

  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics card with OpenGL 3.0 support
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX / macOS compatible

data.legal_notice:
The music used in this game is copyrighted. All usage licenses have been legally obtained through Storyblocks.com. No reproduction, distribution, or use of the music in this game is allowed without explicit permission from the rights holders.

The images and videos in the game, as well as the story, are the exclusive property of Coeur de Cochon. Any reproduction, modification, or distribution without prior authorization is strictly prohibited and may result in legal action.

data.name: JASON, Coming of Age
data.detailed_description:
An adult visual novel that immerses you in the vibrant life of a young man of 25 as he explores the complexities of love, life, and its mysteries.

Having just landed a job as a technician for a local newspaper, you move to a new city and soon discover an inexplicable attraction that women around you seem to feel. What is the source of this mysterious charm? How will you handle the intertwined relationships surrounding you and the impact they’ll have on your future?

JASON: Coming of Age was crafted to offer you maximum freedom while staying true to the core principles of a visual novel.

Every choice you make will shape the story. Dialogues and entire scenes will adapt to your decisions, with your actions potentially causing significant ripple effects and influencing character interactions.

Though Episode 1 follows a main storyline, it can be experienced in multiple ways, leaving the choice entirely up to you...

The personalities of certain characters—even the gender of some—can evolve depending on your choices, profoundly affecting the unfolding adventure and your relationships with them.

Key Features:

  • Freedom of Experimentation: Regardless of the preferences you set at the start of the game (such as sexual orientation, content types to avoid, or hidden fantasies), the game gives you the option to explore unconventional relationships at any moment if you wish.

  • Preference-Based Adaptation: The game tailors itself to your preferences, whether regarding sexuality or specific attractions, creating a personalized and immersive experience.

  • Customization of Love Interests: You can personalize the intimacy of the characters you interact with, fostering a deeper emotional and immersive connection. This customization can be accessed at any time through a dedicated menu, instantly reflecting throughout the game.

  • Character Compendium: Access a list of key story characters, each represented by customizable avatars. Choose from unlocked skins for their appearance, and enter a customization menu to personalize their intimacy levels. Every character includes a detailed description and a dynamic log of shared events, enriching your progression tracking throughout the game.

  • Dynamic Gallery: As your choices shape the story, a gallery of scenes and pivotal moments unlocks progressively. Accessible both during gameplay and from the main menu, it lets you revisit the game's best moments.

  • Interactive Exploration: Discover hidden areas that unlock exclusive scenes, and enjoy multiple camera angles, available via a button during gameplay, for varied experiences.

  • Immersive Messaging Interaction: Use the integrated phone interface to view messages from characters, respond in an immersive way, and influence your relationships. This feature adds a layer of realism and engagement.

  • Time Management: Each game scene is clearly time-stamped, offering an immersive timeline to follow event progression. The phone interface also updates as time passes.

  • Statistics: Check detailed statistics on your interactions with Love Interests at any time, helping you better understand the impact of your choices.

  • Multiple Routes and Informed Choices: If desired, you can try out different available routes before committing to one. No more endless saves or fear of missing out on unique content! The game lets you explore other paths, and you can confirm the one that best suits your adventure.

  • Replay Mode: Replay any scene as often as you want directly from the extras menu to relive the game’s key moments.

Note on game format and structure:

JASON : Coming of Age is designed as an evolving, episodic visual novel, structured like a series. The Part 1 offered here is a complete, polished experience with a coherent narrative arc. Future episodes — such as Part 2, currently in development — will be released as DLCs. This approach allows us to continuously expand the game world based on community feedback, while providing a regular flow of new content.

The game features a harem structure, with free-roam segments, multiple Love Interests, and a strong emphasis on interactions and relationships. While Part 1 has an overarching storyline, it mainly serves as a narrative framework for an open, flexible adventure. The goal isn’t to solve a mystery or reach a singular endpoint, but to immerse yourself in a story shaped by your choices, encounters, and the bonds you form with other characters. These relationship dynamics and personal growth are at the heart of the experience.

data.short_description: Play as a young man of 25 exploring love, temptations, and the mysterious power of attraction he possesses. Dive into an erotic, intense, and unpredictable world where every choice you make will shape your destiny.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Polish
